programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: A man claims his wife died by suicide, but a suspicious house fire 24 years later raises doubts; Josh Mankiewicz remembers the suspect who could not stop talking.

programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: When a pastor loses a second wife in an accident, authorities become suspicious; Dennis Murphy returns to this unforgettable story of evil and betrayal, wondering how far this man of God might have fallen.

programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: Years after a Montana man is found dead, his son searches for answers; Keith Morrison cannot forget the son who opened a box and faced a terrifying family secret.

programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: When an Iowa woman is attacked while home alone with her three children, the confrontation turns deadly; Dennis Murphy examines one of the most sophisticated criminal plots of his "Dateline" career.

programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: When Josh Mankiewicz gets asked about his most memorable stories, the name Dayna Herroz comes to mind; after her daughter and 10-month-old grandson are murdered, her quest for justice ends with a twist in a San Diego courtroom.

programs.title: Dateline: Unforgettable
programs.desc: A pregnant woman vanishes before her own baby shower and her worried family raises the alarm as detectives unravel a chilling mystery; for Josh Mankiewicz, it was a heartbreaking case that stayed with him long after the cameras stopped rolling.
